_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine produces for the default JOURNEY archetype at the trust>=0.50 gate), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed, co-occurrence, or scoring changes, and record why. Note: adding the Euclid/Jai Singh science subgraph raised the frequency of 'influenced_by' (lowering its rarity), which shifted Roman Empire's top journey from Qin Shi Huang to Mithra — a legitimate global-rarity effect. The Euclid -> Roman Republic case locks the new cross-culture bridge (Greek mathematics -> al-Tusi's Persia -> Silk Road -> Rome).
